security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com; worker-src 'self' blob:

bundle.longDescription: PyStudio is a lightweight Python IDE built with Tauri, featuring real Python execution, LSP integration, split editor, and an AI assistant.
